name: Victini
flavor: When it shares the infinite energy it creates, that being’s entire body will be overflowing with power.

ability.name: Victory Star
ability.effect: Once during your turn, after you flip any coins for an attack of 1 of your [Fire] Pokémon, you may ignore all results of those coin flips and begin flipping those coins again. You can't use more than 1 Victory Star Ability each turn.
